title: delphinium geyeri var. wootonii
intro: Delphinium geyeri var. wootonii, also known as Wooton's larkspur, is a rare variety of the Delphinium geyeri plant, belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Delphinium geyeri var. wootonii include relief from pain, inflammation, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential use in treating anxiety and insomnia. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
